scaled_oracle_cases.description: Main scaled case demonstrating parsing of complex TSV and YAML reaction files with comments, empty lines, optional columns, multiline equations, and extra fields, and verifying file artifacts and output correctness.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that parse_reaction_file correctly handles TSV files with comments, empty lines, and extra columns, and YAML files with comments, multiline equations, and extra fields, while ensuring file artifacts exist and stdout contains expected parsed output.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: The parser must ignore comment lines (starting with '#'), skip empty lines, parse only the reaction_id and equation columns (ignoring extra columns) for TSV, and for YAML must ignore comments, correctly parse multiline equations (using scalar block indicator '|'), and ignore extra fields. Output dictionaries must contain only 'id' and 'equation' keys. Sample files must be created with correct content, and stdout must show the parsed reactions exactly as specified.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior (simple DictReader/regex without comment handling) would either crash, include comment lines as data, include extra columns or fields in output, fail on multiline equations, or produce wrong file content.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must demonstrate parsing of TSV files with comments, empty lines, and optional columns.
Scaled executable cases must demonstrate parsing of YAML files with comments, multiline equations, and extra fields.
Scaled executable cases must include checks for file existence, content integrity, and error handling.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Coverage case to verify that parse_reaction_file raises an exception when given a nonexistent file.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Ensure the parser raises an error on nonexistent files, contributing to error handling verification.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: Calling parse_reaction_file on a missing file should raise a ValueError or FileNotFoundError.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: If the parser silently returns an empty list or crashes with different error, the test fails.
scaled_oracle_cases.assertion_code: assert result['error_caught'], "Expected an exception for nonexistent file"
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include checks for file existence, content integrity, and error handling.
